reviewer.evidencePolicy: Only mark review-summary variant telemetry aggregation satisfied; do not infer scenario or mode telemetry coverage.

claimUpdates.whyThisLayer: The claim names summary packet aggregation of explicit telemetry, which is deterministic CLI packet behavior.
claimUpdates.evidenceStatusReason: Verified by a review variants CLI smoke test that writes two variant result packets with explicit telemetry and confirms the top-level review summary aggregates counts, token totals, cost, provider, and model.
claimUpdates.nextAction: Keep review-summary telemetry aggregation tests current when changing review variant result normalization or summary packet shape.
